Blog

Hello World

2026-03-01 by Robin
intro blog

Hello World

Welcome to my blog! This is the first post, generated using a custom Markdown Blog Generator built entirely in Node.js with zero external dependencies.

Features

This blog generator supports:

  • YAML frontmatter parsing
  • Markdown to HTML conversion
  • Syntax highlighting for code blocks
  • Tag-based filtering
  • A clean, responsive design

Code Example

Here's a simple JavaScript snippet:

const greet = (name) => {
  return Hello, ${name}!;
};

console.log(greet(class="hl-string">'World'));

What's Next

Stay tuned for more posts about programming, technology, and more.

"The best way to predict the future is to invent it." - Alan Kay
